metadata.name: Process Warranty Claim for Faulty Sensor

description: A vehicle's transmission sensor failed and was replaced. The vehicle is still under the powertrain warranty, so a claim must be submitted.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the closed repair order, noting the part number of the failed sensor and the labor hours.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all necessary details from the repair order.

nodes.task_description: Verify the vehicle's warranty status and confirm the repair is covered.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the vehicle's powertrain warranty is active and covers the specific part.

nodes.task_description: Create and submit a warranty claim to the manufacturer with all required documentation (repair order, diagnostic codes, technician notes).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the claim through the manufacturer's portal.
